title: nodejs24 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1:24.4.1-5.0.2]
- Fix Release tag in spec file

[1:24.4.1-5.0.1]
- Devel packages explicitly conflicts [Orabug: 38681818]

[1:24.4.1-4]
- Disable internet/ tests entirely

[1:24.4.1-2]
- Make package buildable in centos-stream
- Remove tests that have issues with kojistream network
- Temporarily use vendor copies of dependencies not up-to-date enough in
  the system

[1:24.4.1-1]
- Import SRPM from Fedora Rawhide

* Mon Jun 09 2025 Johnny Hughes <jhughes@redhat.com>
- RPMAUTOSPEC: unresolvable merge
full_text:
